rawOutput:
<Form>
  <Column>
    <Input type="text" bind="username" required placeholder="请输入用户名" />
    <Input type="email" bind="email" required placeholder="请输入邮箱" />
    <Input type="password" bind="password" required placeholder="请设置密码" />
    <Select bind="country" />
    <Button variant="primary" onTap="register">注册</Button>
    <Link onTap="login" variant="subtle">已有账号？登录</Link>
  </Column>
</Form>
